WARRIOR.name: Buried Light
WARRIOR.description:
This setting might interfere with the beams in NOL.

Please let Eshreal know if it does.

WARRIOR.name: Judgement
WARRIOR.description: To adjust the white border circle please go to the global tab.

MAGE.name: Meteor
MAGE.description: Meteor explosion and archer traps explosion use identical models. Editing this will modify traps too.

MAGE.name: Thunderstorm
MAGE.description:
Adjusting this will also effect the thunderbolts from Angelic Ascension (boltslinger ultimate) and from Sundered Skies (ritualist ultimate).

They use the same textures.

MAGE.name: Dimensional Tear
MAGE.description: To adjust the purple fireballs that come from this go to the global spells. It's in Fireballs

MAGE.name: Dawn
MAGE.description: To adjust the fireballs that come from this go to the global spells. It's in Fireballs

ARCHER.name: Arrows
ARCHER.description:
Affects all arrows rendered in the world that are arrow entities.

This includes arrows fired by the player, other players, and mobs.

The transparency on the arrows is currently not implemented.

ARCHER.name: Arrow Bomb
ARCHER.description:
Arrow bomb explosion will also effect exploding puppets.

They use the same textures.

ARCHER.name: Basaltic Trap
ARCHER.description:
The transparency on the basaltic trap model is not implemented.

This is because this still uses the old armor stand way of making models.

ARCHER.name: Murder Flock
ARCHER.description:
The transparency on the Crow model is not implemented.

This is because this still uses the old armor stand way of making models.

ARCHER.name: Ivyroot Mamba
ARCHER.description:
The transparency on the Ivyroot Mamba model is not implemented.

This is because this still uses the old armor stand way of making models.

ARCHER.name: Arsenal Synergy
ARCHER.description:
This is a global toggle for all flint entities.

In my testing it does not effect ingredients that look like flint.

Transparency does not work with this for now.

ARCHER.name: Angelic Ascension
ARCHER.description:
To adjust the thunderstorm from the arrow bomb please adjust the mage ability.

They use they same textures.

SHAMAN.name: Sundered Skies
SHAMAN.description: If you want to configure the thunderstorm effects. Please configure the mage ability.

GLOBAL.name: Mob totem & Judgement border
GLOBAL.description:
This setting adjusts the mob totem & Judgement border circle.

They use the same textures.

GLOBAL.name: NOTG & Judgement Shockwave
GLOBAL.description:
This setting adjusts the Grootslang Wyrmling's shockwave and the Judgement Shockwave.

They use the same textures.

GLOBAL.name: Fireballs
GLOBAL.description:
This setting adjusts Dawn's fireball and Dimensional Tear's purple fireball.

This setting also effects the fireballs in NOL during the sun and black hole attacks.
